turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: Justice Marshall has two opinions of the Court to announce.

turns.name: JUSTICE MARSHALL
turns.text: In the first, Owens against Okure 8756, is on writ of certiorari to the Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit. In this case, we hold that thoughts entertaining claims brought under 28 USC 1983 should borrow the frestoral of general personal injuries state statute of limitations and the Court of Appeals judgment is thereby affirmed.
